summary: Tours and travels website for LUCKY HOLIDAYS. Multi-page site with Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Rating section. Contact page includes phone number 9663202989 and email lakkiholidays@gmail.com. Company logo is clickable and opens homepage. The separate Places page is removed; instead, popular destinations (Coorg, Ooty, Mysore, Goa, Kerala, Hampi and more) are integrated into the main site. Clicking a destination name opens a detailed view with tourist spots categorized as temples, ghat roads, beaches, rivers, hotels, hill stations, and cafes. Header features animated words/text. Logo redesigned to resemble a highway road junction outline (single/double road joining) style with 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' text. 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' sub-label removed from visible header; footer/branding credit changed from 'Built with caffeine.ai' to 'SWAROOP TEAM'.
architectural_notes: Company name: LUCKY HOLIDAYS; logo should be a travel-themed logo and clickable (links to home page)
Destinations include: Coorg, Ooty, Mysore, Goa, Kerala, Hampi, and more; each destination has a detail page with categories: temples, ghat roads, beaches, rivers, hotels, hill stations, cafes

Logo style updated: highway road junction outline (single/double road merging), 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' text only; 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' removed from header; footer branding reads 'SWAROOP TEAM' instead of 'caffeine.ai'
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Toyota Innova Crysta MPV in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (innova-crysta-360.dim_800x500.png)
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Toyota Fortuner SUV in silver, studio lighting on a neutral background (fortuner-360.dim_800x500.png)
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Maruti Suzuki Ertiga MPV in grey, studio lighting on a neutral background (ertiga-360.dim_800x500.png)
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Tempo Traveller 12-seater van in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (tempo-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png)
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Force Traveller mini-bus in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (force-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png)
- Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Luxury Coach tour bus in white and gold livery, studio lighting on a neutral background (luxury-coach-360.dim_800x500.png)

existing_features.title: Create a multi-page tours and travels website for LUCKY HOLIDAYS with a consistent header containing a clickable travel logo and company name 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS'. Clicking the logo navigates to the Home page. Include a navigation bar with links to: Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Ratings.

Create a Home page with a hero section showcasing travel destinations, a brief introduction to LUCKY HOLIDAYS, highlights of key services (tour packages, vehicle rentals, guided trips), and a call-to-action button directing users to the Contact page.
Create an About page describing the LUCKY HOLIDAYS company, its mission, values, and story in the tours and travels industry.

Create a Vehicles page that displays available vehicles for travel packages in a card-based grid layout, each card showing a vehicle image placeholder, vehicle name, type, capacity, and a brief description.

Create a Contact Us page that prominently displays the company phone number 9663202989 and email address lakkiholidays@gmail.com, along with a contact form (name, email, message fields) for inquiry submissions.

Create a Ratings page (or section) where customer reviews and star ratings for LUCKY HOLIDAYS are displayed. Store ratings and reviews in the backend and allow users to submit a rating (1–5 stars) and a short review text.

Apply a warm, adventurous travel-themed visual design across the entire website: use earthy tones (amber, warm orange, deep green) with clean white backgrounds, bold serif-style headings, and card-based layouts. Ensure the design is fully responsive for mobile and desktop viewports.

Add a 'Places' navigation icon/link in the header navigation bar alongside the existing links (Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, Ratings). When clicked, it navigates to a new dedicated Tourist Places page.

Create a new Tourist Places page (/places route) that displays a gallery of popular tourist viewpoints and destinations. Each entry must show a destination image, place name, a short description, and location details. The layout should be a responsive card grid. The last line / footer area of the page must display the text 'Made with ❤️ by SWAROOP TEAM'.
Add generated tourist destination images as static assets for use on the Tourist Places page. Use the images from frontend/public/assets/generated and render them inside the place cards.

Remove the dedicated /places route and the Places.tsx page entirely. Remove the 'Places' link from the header navigation bar so that the nav only contains: Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Ratings.

On the Home page, replace the current 6-destination grid with an expanded 'Popular Destinations' section containing at least 12 destinations: Coorg, Ooty, Mysore, Goa, Kerala, Hampi, Munnar, Kodaikanal, Pondicherry, Wayanad, Chikmagalur, and Rishikesh. Each destination card must display a destination image (from frontend/public/assets/generated), the destination name as a clickable heading, a short description, and the state/region label. The card grid must be responsive (2 columns on mobile, 3–4 on desktop).

Create a new destination detail page at route /destination/:name. When a user clicks any destination name or card on the Home page, they are navigated to this detail page for that destination. The detail page must display the destination name, a hero image, a brief overview, and a categorized grid of tourist spots organized into the following categories: Temples, Ghat Roads, Beaches, Rivers, Hotels, Hill Stations, and Cafes. Each category section shows a heading/icon and a list or grid of notable spots within that destination for that category. Categories with no relevant spots for a given destination may be hidden.

Add the TanStack Router route definition for /destination/:name in App.tsx, importing and rendering the new destination detail page component. Update the Home page destination cards to use router Link components pointing to /destination/:name.

Generate destination hero/card images for the new destinations not already covered: Munnar, Kodaikanal, Pondicherry, Wayanad, Chikmagalur, and Rishikesh. Images should be landscape-oriented travel photography style showing the scenic highlights of each destination. Store them in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the destination data.

Redesign the header logo in `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx` to visually resemble a national highway sign style: use a bold shield or road-sign shaped container with a green/white/yellow color palette, display 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' as the primary text in the logo badge, and include a smaller 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' sub-label beneath or within the logo mark. The logo must remain clickable and navigate to the Home page.

Add an animated rotating/cycling words effect in the header in `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`. A short phrase or tagline area (e.g., below or beside the logo/brand name) should cycle through travel-themed words such as 'Explore', 'Adventure', 'Discover', 'Journey', 'Wander', 'Experience' with a smooth fade-in/fade-out or slide transition. The animation must loop indefinitely and not interfere with navigation usability.

In `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`, remove the 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' sub-label from the header logo area entirely. The logo click-to-home behavior and the animated cycling words tagline must remain unaffected.

Redesign the SVG logo in `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx` to depict a highway road junction outline — specifically a single road merging into a double road (or two roads joining), rendered as a clean line-art / outline style icon. Replace the current national highway shield shape with this road-junction SVG graphic. 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' text should remain as the brand label beside or below the icon. Keep the existing green/amber color palette consistent with the site theme.
In `frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx`, change the attribution/credit text that currently reads 'Built with caffeine.ai' (or any caffeine.ai reference) to read 'SWAROOP TEAM' instead.

In `frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx` (or wherever the 'Popular Destinations' / 'Explore Places' section renders destination items), update each destination entry to display as a card with its destination image (from `frontend/public/assets/generated`) alongside the destination name and description. Currently the items appear as a plain list without images; each item must render as a card showing the destination image, name, and description, consistent with the card-grid layout used elsewhere on the page.

In `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`, increase the font size of the 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' brand name text so it appears noticeably larger (e.g., from the current size to at least `text-2xl` or `text-3xl` on desktop). Also change the header's background color to a rich, deep green (e.g., `#1a4731` or a matching deep forest green from the site's existing color palette) so it stands out distinctly from the current background.

In `frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`, locate the attribution/credit line at the bottom of the page that currently reads 'SWAROOP TEAM' (all caps, possibly with a generic heart or no heart) and change it to display 'Swaroop Team' (title case) preceded by a red heart emoji ❤️, so the final text reads '❤️ Swaroop Team'.

In `frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx`, update the attribution/credit line to read 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'. The existing deep-green background, brand info, navigation links, and contact details must remain unchanged.

In `frontend/src/pages/Vehicles.tsx`, replace the current placeholder images on each vehicle card with generated 360-degree-style vehicle images. Each of the six vehicles (Innova Crysta, Fortuner, Ertiga, Tempo Traveller, Force Traveller, Luxury Coach) must display its own photorealistic image stored in `frontend/public/assets/generated`. The card layout, vehicle name, capacity, features, and badge labels must remain intact.

Clickable LUCKY HOLIDAYS travel logo in header/nav
Remove the separate Places page and integrate popular destinations (Coorg, Ooty, Mysore, Goa, Kerala, Hampi, and more) into the site with expanded destination listings
Clicking a destination name opens a detail view showing tourist spots categorized as temples, ghat roads, beaches, rivers, hotels, hill stations, and cafes
Add animated words/text in the header
Redesign logo to look like a national highway sign with 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' name and 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' branding
Remove 'Built with SWAROOP TEAM' sub-label from the header logo area
Redesign logo to look like a highway road junction outline (single/double road joining) instead of shield/sign style
Change 'Built with caffeine.ai' branding text to 'SWAROOP TEAM'
Popular destinations detail/explore page should show places as cards with pictures, not just a list
Make 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' name bigger in the header and change the header background color
Change 'SWAROOP TEAM' text at the bottom of the home page to 'Swaroop Team' with a red heart (❤️)
Change footer/branding text to 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'
Add correct 360-degree vehicle pictures on the Vehicles page
